info.title: You Are Doing Great API
info.description: API for managing user moments and user profiles with cursor-based pagination

get.description:
Health check endpoint for monitoring. This endpoint does NOT require app token authentication.
Returns MongoDB connection status and overall API health.

Retrieve the current user's profile information.

**Subscription Status Sync:** This endpoint triggers a background sync with RevenueCat
to verify subscription status if the cached status is older than 24 hours. The sync
runs asynchronously (fire-and-forget) and does not delay the response. The returned
status reflects the current database value; subsequent requests will show updated
status after the background sync completes.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

patch.description:
Update user preference settings such as haptic feedback. Preferences are synced
across devices and persisted in the cloud.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

get.description: Retrieve statistics about user's moment submissions including streaks and totals

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

post.description: Submit feedback from the user including title and description

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

get.description:
Retrieve user day summaries with cursor-based pagination for infinite scrolling timeline.

**Timeline Restriction:** Free users can only access data from the last 14 days.
Data older than 14 days is filtered out and `limitReached` is set to true.
Premium users have unlimited access to their full history.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

get.summary: Get AI prompt context for debugging
get.description:
Debug endpoint that returns the exact prompt/context that would be sent to OpenAI's
praise generation API for a specific user and date. This is useful for testing different
models and prompt versions in AI Studio without making actual API calls.

**Note:** This endpoint does NOT call the OpenAI API - it only returns the formatted
prompt text. The temporary moment is created in-memory and not saved to the database.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to generate prompt for (must be a valid MongoDB ObjectId)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date/time when the moment happened (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: momentText
parameters.description: The moment text to include in the prompt

parameters.name: tz
parameters.description: Timezone for formatting times in the prompt

prompt.description: The formatted prompt text that would be sent to OpenAI
prompt.example:
Current Action: went for a run - 10:00
Memory Stream:
Today: strength training - 08:30
Yesterday: meditation - 07:00, healthy meal - 12:30
Last 7 days: strength_training, cardio_workout, mindful_eating
Last 30 days: strength_training (12x), cardio_workout (8x), mindful_eating (15x)
Last year: strength_training (45x), cardio_workout (30x), mindful_eating (60x)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token

get.description:
Retrieve user moments with cursor-based pagination for infinite scrolling.

**Timeline Restriction:** Free users can only access data from the last 14 days.
Data older than 14 days is filtered out and `limitReached` is set to true.
Premium users have unlimited access to their full history.

parameters.name: isFavorite
parameters.description: Filter to show only favorite moments

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter moments from this date onwards (ISO 8601 format). Can be used alone or with endDate for range filtering.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter moments up to and including this date (ISO 8601 format). Can be used alone or with startDate for range filtering.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

post.summary: Create a new moment (without AI enrichment)
post.description:
Create a moment record in the database without AI processing.
The moment is created immediately with undefined action, tags, and praise.
Use POST /moments/{id}/enrich to add AI-generated content.

400.description: Bad request - total or daily limit reached

error.message: You've reached your limit of 10 total moments. Upgrade to premium for unlimited moments!
You've reached your daily limit of 3 moments. Upgrade to premium for 30 moments per day!

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

get.summary: Get a moment by client ID
get.description:
Retrieve a specific moment by its client-generated UUID (used for offline sync correlation).
No timeline restriction applies when fetching individual moments.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

403.description: Forbidden - User does not own this moment

delete.description: Soft delete a moment by setting archivedAt timestamp

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

403.description: Forbidden - User does not own this moment

post.description:
Restore a previously archived moment by clearing the archivedAt timestamp.
This operation is idempotent - restoring an already-active moment returns success without error.
Stats and day summaries are updated asynchronously in the background.

**Note**: Restoring a moment does not count against daily creation limits.

200.description: Moment restored successfully (or was already active)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

403.description: Forbidden - User does not own this moment

post.summary: Enrich a moment with AI-generated content
post.description:
Add AI-generated action category, tags, and praise to an existing moment.
This endpoint is idempotent - if the moment is already enriched, it returns
the existing data without calling the AI again. Checks daily limits before
processing.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing app token (INVALID_APP_TOKEN) or user ID (RESTRICTED_ACCESS)

403.description: Forbidden - User does not own this moment

post.description:
Webhook endpoint for RevenueCat subscription events. Updates user subscription
status based on purchase, renewal, and expiration events.

**Authentication:** Requires `Authorization` header with RevenueCat webhook secret.
Does NOT use x-app-token-code or x-user-id headers.

**Events that grant premium status:**
- INITIAL_PURCHASE
- RENEWAL
- UNCANCELLATION
- SUBSCRIPTION_EXTENDED

**Events that revoke premium status:**
- EXPIRATION

**Events logged but no status change:**
- CANCELLATION (user keeps access until expiration)
- BILLING_ISSUE (grace period)
- PRODUCT_CHANGE
- SUBSCRIPTION_PAUSED
- TRANSFER
- TEST

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing webhook auth

get.description:
Retrieve current runtime configuration settings and their environment variable defaults.
**Authentication:** Requires HTTP Basic Auth with ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing admin credentials

put.description:
Update runtime configuration settings. Changes take effect immediately without server restart.
**Authentication:** Requires HTTP Basic Auth with ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing admin credentials

get.description:
Retrieve aggregated statistics about users and moments.
**Authentication:** Requires HTTP Basic Auth with ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing admin credentials

praiseProvider.description: Active AI provider for praise generation

geminiModel.description: Gemini model ID to use when provider is gemini

chapterCustomNames.description: JSON object mapping chapter numbers to custom names

chapterFormulaBaseCost.description: Cost in sparks to unlock Chapter 1

chapterFormulaLinearCoeff.description: Linear coefficient in chapter cost formula

chapterFormulaQuadraticCoeff.description: Quadratic coefficient in chapter cost formula

chapterFormulaBaseOffset.description: Base offset in chapter cost formula for chapters >= 2

achievementMilestones.description: JSON array of achievement milestones [{sparks, name}]

chapterCustomNames.description: JSON object mapping chapter numbers to custom names

chapterFormulaBaseCost.description: Cost in sparks to unlock Chapter 1

chapterFormulaLinearCoeff.description: Linear coefficient in chapter cost formula

chapterFormulaQuadraticCoeff.description: Quadratic coefficient in chapter cost formula

chapterFormulaBaseOffset.description: Base offset in chapter cost formula

achievementMilestones.description: JSON array of achievement milestones [{sparks, name}]

activeLastSevenDays.description: Users who created at least one moment in the last 7 days

userId.description: External user ID from authentication system

hapticsEnabled.description: User preference for haptic feedback (vibration). Syncs across devices.

clientId.description: Client-generated UUID for offline sync correlation

happenedAt.description: When the moment actually happened (calculated as submittedAt - timeAgo)

praise.example: Great job! You're making amazing progress!

praiseProvider.description: The AI provider that generated the praise (null until enriched)

isFavorite.description: Whether the moment is marked as favorite

timeAgo.description: Seconds passed from when the moment actually happened to when it was submitted

sparksAwarded.description: Number of sparks awarded for this moment (null for moments created before progression system)

EnrichedPraise.description: Structured praise text with cards and highlights for enhanced UI rendering. Null if enrichment is disabled or praise is not yet generated.

cards.description: Ordered list of text cards representing segmented praise

cards.text: Your consistent effort over these past 3 days shows real dedication.

PraiseCard.description: A text card containing a portion of praise with optional highlights

highlights.description: Zero or more highlight spans within the card text

PraiseHighlight.description: A highlight span within card text, marking important words/phrases

type.description:
Type of highlighted content:
- positive: Positive/encouraging words (e.g., "amazing", "incredible", "proud")
- action: User-referencing phrases (e.g., "you did", "your effort")
- number: Quantified achievements (e.g., "3 days", "5th time")

emphasis.description:
Visual emphasis level:
- primary: First highlight in card, uses bold + accent color
- secondary: Additional highlights, uses bold only

clientId.description: Client-generated UUID for offline sync correlation. Server echoes this back in response.

submittedAt.description: When the moment was submitted (optional, defaults to current time)

timeAgo.description: Seconds passed from when the moment actually happened to when it was submitted (optional)

totalSparks.description: User's new total sparks after this moment

chapter.description: User's current chapter after this moment

chapterName.description: Display name of the current chapter

isNewChapter.description: True if this moment caused a chapter unlock (client can show animation)

isFavorite.description: Whether to mark the moment as favorite

id.description: Unique identifier for the day summary

date.description: The date this summary represents (start of day)

text.description: AI-generated summary text (null if no moments for this day)
text.example: You had a productive day with 5 workouts and quality family time!

tags.description: Top 5 most popular tags from moments on this day

momentsCount.description: Total number of moments logged on this day

timesOfDay.description: Array of time periods when moments were logged (sunrise=5-8am, cloud-sun=8am-12pm, sun-medium=12-5pm, sunset=5-8pm, moon=night)

state.description:
The processing state of the day summary:
- INPROGRESS: Summary exists but AI text generation has not completed yet
- FINALISED: Summary is complete with AI-generated text and all metadata

nextCursor.description: Date cursor for the next page

hasNextPage.description: Whether there are more pages available

limitReached.description: Whether the user has reached their timeline limit (true for free users when older data exists, always false for premium)

hasNextPage.description: Whether there are more pages available

limitReached.description: Whether the user has reached their timeline limit (true for free users when older data exists, always false for premium)

userId.description: External user ID from authentication system

totalMoments.description: Total number of moments submitted by the user

longestStreak.description: Longest consecutive days streak ever achieved

lastMomentDate.description: Timestamp of the last submitted moment

totalSparks.description: Lifetime total sparks accumulated (monotonically increasing, never decreases)

chapter.description: Current chapter level (starts at 0 for Prologue)

chapterName.description: Display name for the current chapter

nextChapterCost.description: Sparks cost of the next chapter alone (the "width" of the progress bar)

nextChapterThreshold.description: Cumulative sparks needed to reach the next chapter

sparksToNextChapter.description: Remaining sparks needed to unlock the next chapter

sparksInCurrentChapter.description: Sparks earned within the current chapter (the "fill" of a progress bar that starts from 0)

text.example: I noticed that when I submit a moment with a very long text...
It would be great if the app had...

app_user_id.description: User ID in RevenueCat (may be an alias)

store.description: Store the purchase was made in

message.example: You've reached your daily limit of 10 moments. Upgrade to premium for 50 moments per day!

meta.description: Optional additional metadata about the error

appToken.name: x-app-token-code
appToken.description: App token for API access validation. Required for all /api/* endpoints except /api/health and webhooks.

revenueCatAuth.description: RevenueCat webhook authorization. Configure this secret in RevenueCat dashboard.

adminAuth.description: Admin panel authentication. Requires ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variables.
